data.title: Textile Recycling Market to Attain USD 11.39 Bn by 2031 with Asia Pacific Holding 46.10% Share in 2025, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, a recent report from Mordor Intelligence reveals that the textile recycling market was worth USD 6.62 billion in 2025. The market is anticipated to expand to around USD 7.25 billion in 2026 and is forecasted to reach approximately USD 11.39 billion by 2031, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.48%. The growth in the sector can be attributed to factors such as an increasing focus on sustainability and recycling practices.

data.title: PNC Declares Dividend of $1.70 on Common Stock
data.description: On April 2, 2026, The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.70 per share on their common stock. This dividend is set to be paid out on May 5, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such at the end of business hours.

data.title: J.S. Held Releases 2026 Autonomous Vehicle Industry Report Highlighting IP as the Next Competitive Frontier
data.description: A recently released report delves into the impact of innovation, regulation, and intellectual property strategy on the evolution of autonomous mobility. The 2026 Autonomous Vehicle (AV) Industry Report, unveiled by prestigious consulting firm J.S. Held in New York on April 2, 2026, offers insights on this rapidly advancing sector. The report was crafted by Ocean Tomo.

data.title: Eberly & Associates Officially Rebrands to Pape-Dawson
data.description: In Atlanta, a major civil engineering and professional services firm, Pape-Dawson, has revealed that Eberly & Associates has undergone a rebranding and will now operate under the Pape-Dawson name. The transformation took place after Eberly & Associates merged with Pape-Dawson in 2025, aiming to combine their resources seamlessly for improved client service in the Southeast region and beyond. Established in Georgia in 1982, Eberly brings a wealth of local expertise to the collaboration.

data.title: The Beverly Hills Estates and Savills Announce Association
data.description: A prestigious real estate company based in West Hollywood, California, The Beverly Hills Estates, has formed an association with Savills, a leading global real estate services provider. This partnership establishes The Beverly Hills Estates as Savills' exclusive residential brokerage partner for the U.S. West Coast region. The collaboration aims to enhance international connections and facilitate a more efficient process for clients interested in high-end real estate markets globally. This strategic alliance combines the strengths of both firms to provide unparalleled services to discerning clientele.

data.title: Peace and Sport has launched the 2026 #WhiteCard global campaign
data.description: In Monaco on April 2, 2026, Peace and Sport announced the commencement of the 2026 iteration of its worldwide digital initiative #WhiteCard, with H.S.H. Prince Albert II of Monaco in attendance. This campaign, launched on the International Day of Sport for Development and Peace, aims to mobilize support for peace through sport.

data.title: Contour Airlines Announces New Seasonal Flights from Beckley, West Virginia to Myrtle Beach, South Carolina
data.description: Exciting news as Contour Airlines recently revealed plans to introduce seasonal nonstop flights from Raleigh County Memorial Airport (BKW) in Beckley, WV, to Myrtle Beach International Airport (MYR) in Myrtle Beach, SC. The new service is set to operate during peak seasons, providing more convenient travel options for passengers. Travelers can now easily access the popular destination from West Virginia, further expanding the connectivity between the two states. This initiative aims to enhance tourism and travel opportunities, with the airline offering direct flights between the two airports. Such developments signify a significant step in boosting air travel accessibility, catering to the increasing demand for efficient and direct routes. This strategic move is expected to benefit a multitude of passengers seeking seamless journeys between Beckley and Myrtle Beach, with the seasonal service set to enhance overall travel experiences.

data.title: MedOne and Nanodropper Announce Early Success of MediSplit Program, Demonstrating Reduced Cost, Improved Adherence, and Reduced Side Effects
data.description: In Rochester, Minnesota on April 2, 2026, MedOne and Nanodropper revealed initial findings from the MediSplit program. MedOne, a pharmacy benefit manager with a focus on outcomes-based care, partnered with Nanodropper, an expert in precision medication delivery solutions. The program aims to improve clinical care efficiency and effectiveness. This collaboration indicates a positive start to the program, showing promising results for both companies.

data.title: FrogTape® Named Exclusive Painter's Tape of Spring 2026 One Room Challenge®
data.description: Leading premium painter's tape brand, FrogTape®, is showing its commitment to designers and DIY enthusiasts by offering tools tailored for creating remarkable room makeovers. In AVON, Ohio, on April 2, 2026, FrogTape® announced its exclusive partnership as the Painter's Tape for the Spring 2026 One Room event. This collaboration aims to highlight the brand's dedication to innovation and quality in the realm of painting.

data.title: POLYWOOD® Expands Innovation Leadership with Debut of Laguna In-Pool Collection and New Outdoor Planter Line for Spring
data.description: In Syracuse, Indiana, on April 2, 2026, POLYWOOD® introduced its new Laguna In-Pool Collection, setting a new standard for sustainable outdoor living. With over 35 years of experience in all-weather performance and material innovation, POLYWOOD® remains at the forefront of the industry. The new collection is designed to enhance the outdoor living experience with cutting-edge design and durability.

data.title: Active Minds Launches "Your Voice is Your Power" Resource Hub with $1 Million Grant from Google to Address Gen Z Mental Health and Digital Wellbeing
data.description: Empowering young people to advocate for mental health and promote digital wellness, an organization known as Active Minds, received a substantial boost on April 2, 2026. This nonprofit, which is a key player in mobilizing youth and young adults to change perceptions around mental health, secured a generous $1 million grant from Google.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Four Seasons Hotels and Resorts/
data.description: The newly opened Four Seasons Hotel and Residences in Cartagena signifies a shift towards modern luxury in a captivating city. The announcement was made on April 2, 2026, by Four Seasons Hotels and Resorts through PR Newswire. This development marks a significant change in the hospitality industry, offering lavish accommodations in one of the most intriguing cities globally.

data.title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: EMCOR Group, Inc., a leading company in mechanical and electrical construction services, industrial infrastructure, and building services, has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. This dividend, announced in NORWALK, Conn., will be paid on April 30, 2026, to stockholders holding shares by April 16, 2026. EMCOR Group, Inc. is a Fortune 500 and S&P 500 member, showcasing its prominence in the industry.
